---
title: "Contact"
toc: false
---

Participation in the Silicon Sample Benchmark is by invitation. If you believe your team should be on the list, or you have questions about the [registration form](index.html#registration), the data schemas, or edge cases of the rules, get in touch with the core team.

Reach us at [\[contact-email\]](mailto:[contact-email]).

Clarifications of general interest are answered publicly on this website, so that all participating teams see the same information.
